FAQs

Frequently Asked Questions

No Confusion, Just Clarity.

Do you take one-off projects if I don’t want to sign up for a monthly plan?

Yes, we do. While many of our clients choose ongoing plans for consistent support, we also take on one-off projects for specific design or marketing needs. Just reach out with your idea, and we’ll bring it to life.

What services do you offer ?

We specialize in conversion-focused web design, strategic brand identity, and SaaS product design. Whether you're building a new brand, scaling your website, or refining your product UX, we’re here to help you grow.

Do you only work on full websites and brands?

Not at all. We offer flexible packages — from complete rebrands and full websites to landing pages, SaaS dashboards, or even just a logo refresh. Wherever your brand is, we help you level up.

How long does a project take?

Brand identity projects usually take 2–4 weeks, while full website or SaaS design projects take 3–6 weeks. We always prioritize clarity, speed, and collaboration.

Do you design SaaS dashboards or internal tools?

Yes, we design both SaaS dashboards and internal tools. We focus on building clean, intuitive, and scalable interfaces that simplify complex workflows and make data easy to understand. Our goal is to create tools that are not just visually appealing but also highly functional and efficient for everyday use.

What’s included in a typical project?

A brand design project includes logo, color palette, typography, visual direction, and brand guidelines. A web/SaaS design project includes UX strategy, UI design, and handoff-ready files — everything devs need to build fast.

What makes Humanly different from other design agencies?

We combine human-first design thinking with data-backed strategy. Every decision — from layout to brand tone — is made to increase clarity, trust, and conversion. No fluff. No cookie-cutter templates.

Do you take one-off projects if I don’t want to sign up for a monthly plan?

Yes, we do. While many of our clients choose ongoing plans for consistent support, we also take on one-off projects for specific design or marketing needs. Just reach out with your idea, and we’ll bring it to life.
